opinion.h4: STRELICH v. HEINZE, WARDEN, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF CALIFORNIA. No. 868, Misc. Decided February 26, 1962.
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
369 U.S. 36 HARPER v. BANNAN, WARDEN. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MICHIGAN. No. 884, Misc. Decided February 26, 1962.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
